---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a language feature or tooling improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that X doesn't support well today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it's a language feature, show the syntax you have in
mind:

```x
// proposed syntax
```

## How it would compile / behave

Briefly, how this might lower to C or interact with existing features
(function kinds, refined types, DI, results, match, generics, ...).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches, workarounds, or prior art in other languages.

## Additional context

Links, examples, or anything else. Note that X is experimental and pre-1.0;
features are added on a best-effort basis.
